MENU

CALL FOR PAPERS

The Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture at Istanbul Okan University is organizing the second edition of Manifest’ou.

International Symposium on Art and Design.

This year’s theme:

Everyday Life: The Aesthetics and Politics of the Quotidian in Art and Design

For further information and to apply to the Manifest’ou. 2nd International Symposium on Art and Design, please visit the official symposium website.

Click here for the official website.
